response:
Emily runs a dog rescue center located at [address]. She currently has 25 dogs in her care. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, increasing her total number of dogs to [number after receiving puppies]. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog they had found, which added [number of stray dog] to her collection, making the total [total after receiving stray dog]. 

***

On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which means [number of dogs adopted] were taken away from the rescue center. After the adoptions, Emily now has [current number of dogs] dogs remaining. The rescue center continues to operate with the help of [number of volunteers], and they rely on donations from the community at [donation location]. Emily is always looking for new volunteers to join her at [volunteer meeting place].
